title: review-intent — Judge the Reasoning, Not Just the Diff
logline: When an AI writes the code, the diff can't tell you if the reasoning was sound — review-intent renders git diff as one interactive page that pins the author's claimed intent against un-gameable measured blast radius, so contradictions surface and you approve with eyes open.
note: Realized by demo/capture/promo.html (1920x1080 stage) + demo/capture/promo.mjs (Playwright director/recorder). Final render ~47s with fade in/out. Silent, caption-driven; live tool footage from ../widget-api/review.html composited via an app-window iframe.

scenes.caption:
Your agent wrote the code.
In seconds.
scenes.motion: fade-in from black, text snaps on, ominous stillness

scenes.caption:
You have 90 seconds
to approve it.
scenes.motion: slow push-in, cursor creep toward a faint green Approve button

scenes.caption: LGTM
scenes.motion: click Approve; LGTM stamp slams over a blurred unread diff; glitch flicker

scenes.caption:
The diff shows WHAT changed.
Not whether the reasoning was sound.
scenes.motion: blurred diff lines drifting behind a dimmed overlay

scenes.caption: review-intent — See the change. Judge the intent.

git diff -> one interactive review page.
No LLM. No API key. No token cost.
scenes.motion: live review.html, gentle auto-scroll of the top section

scenes.caption:
MEASURED. Straight from the diff. Un-gameable.
Touches auth. Touches dependencies.
scenes.motion: ken-burns onto the two red sensitive-path badges

scenes.caption:
CLAIMED, right beside it.
When they disagree, you see it.
scenes.motion: risk ledger slides in beside the measured card (split-screen)

scenes.caption:
Five charts. Hand-drawn SVG. Zero dependencies.
Code changed, tests didn't? Red flag, raised.
scenes.motion: fast push across the charts, settle on the change-map dot

scenes.caption: One click. Reviewed in priority order.
scenes.motion: live guided tour stepping files, highlight flash drives the cuts

scenes.caption:
14 themes. Live.
Same un-gameable truth.
scenes.motion: live theme switch: synthwave then dark, smooth palette morphs

scenes.caption:
npx @christianmorup/review-intent
MIT - open source
Stop rubber-stamping AI code.
scenes.motion: command resolves in, accent underline wipe, hold
